image_prompt: SVG: exponential decay graph — Percentage of uranium-235 nuclei remaining (0–100, minor 2 %) vs Time / millions of years (0–4000, minor 200). Smooth decay curve, half-life ≈ 700 My; 87.5 % decayed (12.5 % remaining = 3 half-lives) read at ~2100 My.

render_data.title: Decay of uranium-235 in used fuel rods

image_prompt: SVG: scatter plot Resistance / Ω (0–12.0, minor 0.2) vs Length / cm (0–130, minor 2) with 4 data points at (40,3.0), (60,4.7), (80,6.5), (120,9.6). Student plots (100, 8.0) and draws best-fit line through the origin (manganin wire).
SVG: Force / mN (-2.0 to 6.0, minor 0.4) vs Current / A (0–12, minor 0.4), scatter at I=6–11 with best-fit line crossing the x-axis at 4 A and y-intercept ≈ -2.6 mN (friction threshold).

SVG: oil-fired power plant schematic — crude oil tank → oil burner / furnace → boiler / heat exchanger (liquid water → steam) → turbine → generator → electricity; used steam → cooling tower / condenser → condensed water returns.
